meta.title: Name Compatibility Test 💕 - DopaBrain
meta.description: Test name compatibility with your crush, partner, or friend! Discover love, friendship, chemistry scores.

level.soulmateDesc: An extraordinary connection! Your names resonate on the deepest level. A rare and powerful bond.
level.perfectDesc: Outstanding compatibility! The energy between your names creates beautiful harmony.
level.greatDesc: A strong connection exists. With understanding and effort, this can become truly special.
level.goodDesc: A solid foundation exists. With patience and communication, this can grow into something meaningful.
level.interestingDesc: An intriguing dynamic. Your differences can be complementary. Embrace what makes you unique together.
level.growingDesc: Every great relationship starts somewhere! Much to discover about each other. The journey is the reward.

advice.high: Your connection is naturally strong. Maintain open communication and never take each other for granted.
advice.medium: Great potential! Understand each other's love language and make small gestures of appreciation daily.
advice.low: Focus on building trust through honest communication. Find common interests and create shared experiences.
advice.growing: Every connection has its own beauty. Be your authentic self and show genuine interest in the other person.

share.title: Name Compatibility Test
